kes has been almost once in ten years. From 1990s
onwards the frequency has increased.
Whenever *{rahu Saturn} has transited rishaba or vrichika
there has been quakes and mass deaths. Whenever Saturn
/Jupiter or rahu has been in 2/12 and the other planets in
6 8 axis from them then there is a quake.
Following are the basic observations.
 Jupiter in the kumbha or simha brings mass death.
 Rahu and ketu in axis of mithuna/dhanus, mesha and
thula (India 6 and 12 houses) kumbha and simha (4 and
10 house), vrichika/Taurus (1 and 7th) are strong
points of mass death.
 Saturn in simha, dhanus and mesha is death inflicting.
 Mars in thula aspecting thula is also dangerous points.
 Rashi of kumbha and meena are involved in general

 Rashis are in male sign and fixed sign
 Rashis which are in the airy and fiery sign are
involved
 Earthquakes occur when Saturn is in dhanus or mesha,
rahu in meenam or virgo and Jupiter in simham or
rishaba.
